violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing. They are vacuum sealing deli meats, sliced cheese, and raw meat product and do not have a HACCP plan.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. No hood system over the stove where meat is cooked.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. Clean/Sanitizer utensils being dried on towels in the 3 compartment sink. Need to be placed in a proper position to air dry.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single-use items were being stored on the floor in the dry storage area and behind the liquor counter.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Floors in the dry storage area are not a cleanable surface, they are bare wood

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Hole in the floor in the kitchen exposing the bare wood underneath. Hole in the ceiling above the meat slicer is exposed sheet rock.
